name: Scallops with Orange and Chervil Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Nicoise olives, pitted and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place scallops in a large skillet and pour over the orange juice and white wine.
2. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat to low and simmer the scallops just until barely cooked through (about 2-3 minutes).
3. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the scallops to a mixing bowl.
4. Reduce the remaining liquid in the pan over high heat to 1/2 cup. Remove from the heat and set aside.
5. Add the scallions, olives, tomatoes, orange zest, chervil, and capers to the scallops. Toss to combine.
6. Whisk the reduced poaching liquid and olive oil together. Season the dressing with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
7. Pour the dressing over the scallop salad and toss to coat.
8. Serve at once or refrigerate until ready to serve.
